title: Goals, Context, Outputs, Boundaries, and Done Conditions · Failure Case: Boundaries
summary: Write a production-ready prompt for a high-impact code and document change. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt boundaries increment in a reusable goal-context-output-boundary template. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Name material do-not-change, authorization, safety, and escalation boundaries.
Specify output structure, granularity, evidence, and machine-readable constraints when they matter.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
